title: rubus × semisilvaticus
intro: Rubus × semisilvaticus, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as supporting digestive and immune system function. Rubus × semisilvaticus can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in jams and jellies due to its sweet and flavorful berries.
